metadata.description: Plugins that solve foundational engineering problems in the brave new world of agentic engineering.

plugins.name: but-first-planning
plugins.description: A file-based planning + build workflow: author a language-agnostic spec, plan it, and build it with coordinated builder agents — the spec-* authoring skills, the plan-* backlog skills, the build loop, and an autopilot that chains it all, landing in a single .plan/ workspace.

plugins.name: codebase-optimizer
plugins.description: Staged autonomous codebase optimizer — organize the file tree, decompose god-files, and deepen shallow architecture, each behind CI-faithful validation with revert-on-red.

plugins.name: agentic-teamwork
plugins.description: Deterministic version-control guardrails for mixed-skill teams — hooks that block commits to protected branches, force-pushes, secrets, and failing tests, in Claude Code, the terminal, and CI. GitHub and GitLab first-class.

plugins.name: workflow-studio
plugins.description: Blueprint-style visual studio for Claude Code dynamic workflows — node canvas, typed pins, lossless graph↔.js round-trip — plus a hand-authoring skill.

plugins.name: animated-storytelling
plugins.description: Narrative arc + visual design + motion craft for making ideas land: NCP storyform, hierarchy/type/color, and Motion v12 recipes.

plugins.name: write-like-me
plugins.description: Make Claude's human-facing prose sound like you — a calibrated always-on voice profile, AI-tell auditing, and hooks that learn from your style feedback.

plugins.name: plugin-workbench
plugins.description: A plugin's real cost is invisible until installed, and authoring one means guessing at unwritten standards — so make, measure, and fix plugins around one six-dimension rubric: author against it, score any plugin into an HTML scorecard with an adopt/rework verdict, and apply the fixes ranked by script-computed point delta.
